objective: Select the fresh review handoff, resolve its bounded Phase 2/3 architecture escalation, and dispatch one docs-only remediation for all six actionable HCM-0.1 findings.

sections: Phase 3 — Vocabulary, Context Resolution, Snapshot Memory, and projections

Resolved the bounded Phase 2/3 projection escalation in favor of fixed non-Resolution Phase 2 rendering and deferred generic/Resolution-aware projection to Phase 3.

decisions.summary: Phase 2 is limited to fixed deterministic non-Resolution first-party review renderers; generic configured custom-kind and Resolution-aware projections require the Phase 3 kernel/engine.
